hooks.command: mkdir -p "$PWD/.claude/sessions" && if [ -f "$PWD/.claude/handoff.md" ]; then cp "$PWD/.claude/handoff.md" "$PWD/.claude/sessions/$(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H-%M-%S).md"; fi && bash "$HOME/.cascade/session-complete-hook.sh" "$PWD" 3000 > /dev/null 2>&1 &
hooks.description: Cascade: save session log and notify dashboard
